title: anthemis arvensis subsp. sphacelata
intro: Anthemis arvensis subsp. sphacelata, also known as Sphacelate Yarrow, is a subspecies of the Anthemis arvensis plant, a flowering perennial that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic actions, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Anthemis arvensis subsp. sphacelata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and soothe digestive issues, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Sphacelate Yarrow include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
